case_title: HIRAM LEE VS. JOEL V. MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEE, HIRAM AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JOEL V. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$98.00) SERVED APR-14-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JOEL V.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-02-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF HIRAM LEE IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS KRISS MIRANDA (PROPERTY AGENT). DEFENDANT JOEL MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. CASE WAS HEARD TOGETHER WITH CSM-23-866763 (LEE V. BENEDIX) AS CLAIM IS RELATED. DEFENDANT SUBMITTED DECLARATION TO REQUEST CHANGE OF ADDRESS IS RECEIVED, ADDRESS IS UPDATED IN THE SYSTEM AND FILED BY COURTROOM CLERK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, HIRAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JOEL V. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $173.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,173.00, THIS IS A SISTER CASE TO LEE V. BENEDIX CSM-23-866763. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. TESTIMONY & PHOTOGRAPHS ESTABLISHED. DEFENDANT MADE UNAUTHORIZE STRUCTURAL ALTERATIONS AND SIGNIFICANTLY DAMAGED THE PROPERTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HIRAM
